Appearances:
Plaintiff Lyudmila Shekhtman is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kimberly Farmer is present.
Attorney Irina Naduhovskaya appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of MAR-03-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
